Papers

Journal Articles

  1. Branch-and-Bound Algorithms as Polynomial-time Approximation Schemes
    K. I. Encz, M. Mastrolilli, and E. Vercesi
    Mathematics of Operations Research 2026
  2. On the integrality gap of small Asymmetric Traveling Salesman Problems: A polyhedral and computational approach
    E. Vercesi, J. Barta, L. M. Gambardella, and 2 more authors
    Discrete Optimization 2025
  3. Multi-objective stochastic scheduling of inpatient and outpatient surgeries
    A. M. Bernardelli, L. Bonasera, D. Duma, and 1 more author
    Flexible Services and Manufacturing Journal 2024
  4. On the generation of metric TSP instances with a large integrality gap by branch-and-cut
    E. Vercesi, S. Gualandi, M. Mastrolilli, and 1 more author
    Mathematical Programming Computation 2023
  5. A kinetic description of the body size distribution of species
    S. Gualandi, E. Vercesi, and G. Toscani
    Mathematical Models and Methods in Applied Sciences 2022

    S. Huber, M. Mastrolilli, and E. Vercesi
    2026
  2. The Integrality Gap of the Traveling Salesman Problem is 4/3 if the LP Solution Has at Most n+6 Non-zero Components
    T. Villa, E. Vercesi, J. Barta, and 1 more author
    2025
  3. Branch-and-Bound Algorithms as Polynomial-time Approximation Schemes
    K. I. Encz, M. Mastrolilli, and E. Vercesi
